title: Violin teacher
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

From world-renowned teachers to world-class friendships, students at Madison find a community that embraces them, challenges them, and exposes them to new heights. We are not only passionate about growing a new generation of musicians, music lovers, and future patrons of the arts — we are determined to arm our children with the tools to become great thinkers, citizens, and lifelong lovers of learning.

Learning to sing or play a musical instrument and acquiring the unique habits of mind that come with it is just one of the most incredible opportunities that Madison Academy can offer.

Responsibilities

  • Design and deliver engaging music lessons that foster student creativity and skill development in singing or playing musical instruments
  • Cultivate a supportive learning environment that encourages student growth and nurtures a lifelong passion for music and learning
  • Apply professional musicianship and teaching techniques to adapt instruction to diverse student needs and learning styles
  • Collaborate with colleagues to enhance curriculum and contribute to a vibrant, professional, and friendly school culture
  • Continuously reflect on and improve teaching practices as part of an ongoing learning journey

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma in Music
  • Prior teaching experience in music education

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Demonstrated creativity, dedication, and passion for music education
  • Ability to maintain a strategic perspective on student development and the broader educational mission
